patches.note: menu_hardmode PLAY branch: move the initial dispatch target forward by the 35-byte Char_P2 write inserted at 0x2E.
Before initLevelTransition, map chooseKongP2.currentState through kongMapping and write the resulting Kong string to mRuntimeData.Char_P2. local_3 keeps max_stack at the original value 5.
Correct the PLAY case of the final lookupswitch: the switch moves forward by 35 bytes while the PLAY case target at 0x0F remains before the inserted block. Offset changes from -178 to -213.
